dashboard.label: System Baseline Anomaly Detection
dashboard.description: Detect deviations from normal baseline activity patterns

search.query: index=endpoint | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H"), day=strftime(_time, "%w") | stats count as current_count by hour, day, Computer | sort hour
index=endpoint earliest=-24h | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | stats count as current_count by hour | sort hour
